hooks.command: echo "CONTEXT REMINDER: Read CLAUDE.md for project stack and conventions. Agents: scrum-po, architect, business-analyst, frontend-dev, backend-dev, database-analyst, devops, qa-tester, ciso, ui-ux-designer, github-reviewer, seo-expert. Commands: /review-branch, /pr-create, /pr-merge, /security-audit, /sprint-dispatch, /e2e-test. Plugins: code-review, pr-review-toolkit, superpowers, playwright, security-guidance, frontend-design, ui-ux-pro-max, figma, vercel, stripe, code-simplifier. ClickUp workflow: BACKLOG->EN COURS->TESTING->EN REVUE (if fail)->TESTING->TERMINE. Assignee: Patrick Bartosik. Sprints: 1 mois."

file="$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty')"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
